## Went well
Compensation bands for L4/L5/L6 engineers in SF vs NYC vs remote; updated quarterly. Candidate NPS survey after every loop, won or lost, to improve the experience.

## Didn't go well
Capacity plan for Q3: we need 40% more headroom based on the last 90d growth curve. Chaos day: we want to kill 30% of replicas in staging and see if the SLO holds.

## Action items
JSONB query on the metadata column isn't hitting the GIN index. Query planner picks seq scan.

## Went well
Compensation bands for L4/L5/L6 engineers in SF vs NYC vs remote; updated quarterly. Tech screen is 60min: 2 behavioral, 2 technical. Interviewer guide updated 2026-04-01.

## Didn't go well
Postgres migration 0042 adds a NOT NULL column without a default; backfill will take 4 hours on prod. Vacuum is lagging on the events table — autovacuum thresholds are too conservative.

## Action items
Open-source license audit: we're using 3 AGPL deps that need to be replaced before enterprise launch.

sections.text:
## Went well
Expense reimbursement process: use Brex card for anything under $500, Concur for anything over. First-week buddy system: assign each new hire a buddy for Slack DMs, not their manager.

## Didn't go well
Paging policy: Sev1 pages primary, Sev2 Slack-only during business hours, Sev3 ticket only. Load test with k6: 2000 concurrent users hit the search endpoint, p99 was 450ms.

## Action items
Webinar schedule: 3 per quarter, 45min each, demo + Q&A. Topics lined up through Q3.

sections.text:
## Went well
The customer portal is letting users cancel subscriptions mid-term without refund logic. Credit notes issued via the dashboard are not syncing back to QuickBooks.

## Didn't go well
Customer advisory board meeting notes: 8 customers, 2h, topics were SSO, SAML, SCIM. PRD for the self-service org invites feature: requirements, wireframes, metrics to track.

## Action items
DR drill scheduled next week: failover postgres from us-east-1 to us-west-2, expected RTO 10m.
sections.title: Retro

sections.text:
## Went well
Synthetic uptime check is failing because the TLS certificate was renewed but the CA bundle wasn't updated. Distributed tracing across our Go → Rust gRPC boundary is not propagating trace context.

## Didn't go well
LoRA adapter size for the intent classifier is 40MB; inference on the edge is fine, cold start is not. Evaluation harness: 500 labeled queries, we A/B test embedding models nightly against this set.

## Action items
A/B test results for the new signup flow: +12% activation on the redesigned form.
sections.title: Retro

sections.text:
## Went well
EU VAT calculation is off by the rounding rule — we round per-line, Stripe rounds per-invoice. Annual plan renewal should create a draft invoice 7 days before renewal, not 3.

## Didn't go well
CronJob for nightly ETL is overlapping because concurrencyPolicy was left at the default Allow. The cluster autoscaler can't scale from zero because the instance group has no node labels.

## Action items
Accessibility audit: 14 color-contrast failures on the dark theme, mostly in secondary text.

## Didn't go well

PRD for the self-service org invites feature: requirements, wireframes, metrics to track.

## Went well
We need row-level encryption for the PII columns; Postgres pgcrypto is the shortest path. Our SSO IdP is Okta, and the metadata URL rotated without notice. All logins failed for 8 minutes.

## Didn't go well
Accessibility audit: 14 color-contrast failures on the dark theme, mostly in secondary text. Core Web Vitals: LCP is 4.2s on the pricing page because the hero image is eagerly loaded.

## Action items

## Went well
Coupon redemptions are not being deduplicated — same code can be applied twice in the same checkout. EU VAT calculation is off by the rounding rule — we round per-line, Stripe rounds per-invoice.

## Didn't go well
SBOM generation for the release pipeline needs to include Rust crates, not just Go + npm. Our SSO IdP is Okta, and the metadata URL rotated without notice. All logins failed for 8 minutes.

## Action items
Expense reimbursement process: use Brex card for anything under $500, Concur for anything over.

OpenTelemetry span attribute `http.status_code` is missing from the ingress traces. Error budget dashboard shows we've burned 40% of the monthly budget already; it's the 8th.

## Didn't go well
Evaluation harness: 500 labeled queries, we A/B test embedding models nightly against this set. Vector DB cost projection at 10M chunks: $340/mo on LanceDB with IVF_PQ, $1200 on Pinecone.

Prometheus query for p99 latency returns NaN when the service has < 30 requests in the window.

## Went well
LoRA adapter size for the intent classifier is 40MB; inference on the edge is fine, cold start is not. Cost per 1M tokens for text-embedding-3-large is $0.13; fine-tuning Qwen is $0.007 per 1M. 18x cheaper.

## Didn't go well
Vendor risk assessment for new SaaS tools: security, privacy, cost, contract review. Master Services Agreement redline with enterprise customer: they want data-residency guarantees in EU.

## Action items
Pod disruption budget is set to 0 for the payments service — we can't drain the node.
